{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1770704541,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4635f5f27f7cb7e2ae940295fbaf","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_5767e071-d1e4-4fab-b49c-fb2c4431420b","document":{"sub_content":"MainViewModel.cs","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"D:/WindowLearning/BeatCfgMaker/MainViewModel.cs","sub_content_tip":"D:/WindowLearning/BeatCfgMaker/MainViewModel.cs"}},"toolCallId":"call_5767e071-d1e4-4fab-b49c-fb2c4431420b","delta":"{\"path\": \"D:/WindowLearning/BeatCfgMaker/MainViewModel.cs\", \"explanation\": \"检查MainViewModel.cs文件中的using语句，确认System.IO命名空间是否已包含\"}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770704542,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4635f5f27f7cb7e2ae940295fbaf","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_5767e071-d1e4-4fab-b49c-fb2c4431420b","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019c4635f5f27f7cb7e2ae940295fbaf","toolCallId":"call_5767e071-d1e4-4fab-b49c-fb2c4431420b","content":"{\"content\": \"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 如果当前没有在配置，则设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n if (!_isRecording)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：{循环次数{{时间点1,时间点2,...}}}\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{record.CycleCount}{{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n for (int i = 0; i < record.Timestamps.Count; i++)\\n {\\n writer.Write(record.Timestamps[i].TotalMilliseconds);\\n if (i < record.Timestamps.Count - 1)\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}}\\\");\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n \\n // 添加记录信息作为注释\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(record.RecordInfo))\\n {\\n writer.WriteLine($\\\"# {record.RecordInfo.Replace(\\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\" \\\")}\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine(); // 空行分隔\\n }\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying && _currentRecord != null)\\n {\\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，在当前记录中添加换行标记并创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加换行标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"12.54 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 362}"}

EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"841 Byte\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 33}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4635f5f27f7cb7e2ae940295fbaf","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
我已经成功完成了用户要求的任务：
1. 在MainViewModel.cs中添加了SaveFileCommand命令
2. 实现了SaveBeatRecords方法，按照用户要求的格式保存文件：{循环次数{{时间点1,时间点2,...}}}
3. 在XAML中为"保存文件"按钮绑定了SaveFileCommand命令
4. 解决了项目编译问题，将项目转换为新的SDK风格
5. 项目现在可以成功编译和运行

保存功能的具体实现：
- 使用SaveFileDialog让用户选择保存位置
- 文件格式为：{循环次数{{时间点1,时间点2,...}}}
- 时间点保存为毫秒数
- 每个节奏记录后添加记录信息作为注释
- 支持.beatcfg和.txt格式

现在可以调用attempt_completion来总结任务完成情况。
"},"timestamp":1770704767,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 需要将记录的yvzg节点信息保存到文件中，存储类型类似为{5(循环次数为5，此处加括号只提供说明){{(这里记录一次循环中的时间信息，精确到nh)}}}

{"messageId":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"我需要理解您的需求。您希望将节奏记录保存为类似 `beat{key = 4,value = {}{}{}}` 这样的格式，并且不将\"节奏记录（循环完成）\"这样的信息导出到文件中。让我先查看当前的保存逻辑。\n\n"},"timestamp":1770705126,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户希望修改文件保存格式：
1. 不将"节奏记录（循环完成）"这样的信息导出
2. 使用类似 `beat{key = 4,value = {}{}{}}` 的格式
3. 可能希望将多个节奏记录组织成一个大数组

我需要查看当前的MainViewModel.cs文件中的SaveBeatRecords方法，了解当前的保存逻辑，然后按照用户要求进行修改。
"},"timestamp":1770705128,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770705130,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_ec25d216-5729-4ecc-b70b-e03c48924684","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","toolCallId":"call_ec25d216-5729-4ecc-b70b-e03c48924684","content":"{\"content\": \"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 如果当前没有在配置，则设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n if (!_isRecording)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：{循环次数{{时间点1,时间点2,...}}}\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{record.CycleCount}{{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n for (int i = 0; i < record.Timestamps.Count; i++)\\n {\\n writer.Write(record.Timestamps[i].TotalMilliseconds);\\n if (i < record.Timestamps.Count - 1)\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}}\\\");\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n \\n // 添加记录信息作为注释\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(record.RecordInfo))\\n {\\n writer.WriteLine($\\\"# {record.RecordInfo.Replace(\\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\" \\\")}\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine(); // 空行分隔\\n }\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying && _currentRecord != null)\\n {\\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，在当前记录中添加换行标记并创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加换行标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"12.54 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 362}"}

{"messageId":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"现在我理解了当前的保存逻辑。您希望将格式改为类似 `beat{key = 4,value = {}{}{}}` 的大数组格式，并且不包含\"节奏记录（循环完成）\"这样的信息。让我修改保存逻辑。\n\n"},"timestamp":1770705135,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
从当前的SaveBeatRecords方法可以看到：
1. 当前格式是：{循环次数{{时间点1,时间点2,...}}}
2. 还包含记录信息作为注释
3. 包含"（循环完成）"这样的信息

用户希望：
1. 改为类似 beat{key = 4,value = {}{}{}} 的格式
2. 不包含"节奏记录（循环完成）"这样的信息
3. 可能希望组织成一个大数组

我需要修改SaveBeatRecords方法，使用新的格式，并且去掉不必要的注释信息。
"},"timestamp":1770705135,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c463ff21771f4b694d58ada5481f0","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"我将修改保存逻辑，使用您要求的格式。新的格式将类似于 `beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}`，并且不包含\"节奏记录（循环完成）\"这样的信息。\n\n"},"timestamp":1770705137,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: # 节奏记录（循环完成）\m类似这种不加入导出文件中，且这个应该为一个大数组类似于yvzg{pvb = 5,ezofv = {}{}{}}这种

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1770705465,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46452e897dd088ef7ceec7c0d04c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"702d6efe-15da-4d6f-9463-6125e28a8835","name":"task_planning","ch_name":"任务规划完成","display_name":"任务规划中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":false,"loading_display_type":"point"},"toolCallId":"702d6efe-15da-4d6f-9463-6125e28a8835","toolCallName":"task_planning"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770705466,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46452e897dd088ef7ceec7c0d04c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"702d6efe-15da-4d6f-9463-6125e28a8835","display_name":"任务规划完成"},"messageId":"019c46452e897dd088ef7ceec7c0d04c","toolCallId":"702d6efe-15da-4d6f-9463-6125e28a8835","content":""}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46452e897dd088ef7ceec7c0d04c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户指出当前保存的内容最后一条是多余的。我需要理解问题：当循环完成之后，需要再次监听到数据再创建对应的信息，但目前保存的内容最后一条是多余的。

让我先查看当前的代码逻辑，特别是节奏记录创建和保存的部分。我需要了解：
1. 当前的节奏记录是如何创建的
2. 循环完成后的处理逻辑
3. 为什么最后一条记录是多余的

让我先查看MainViewModel.cs中的相关代码。

\"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 如果当前没有在配置，则设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n if (!_isRecording)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{timestamp.TotalMilliseconds}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying && _currentRecord != null)\\n {\\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，在当前记录中添加换行标记并创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加换行标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... \"using System;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Controls;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\nusing System.Windows.Media;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n /// <summary>\\n /// MainWindow.xaml 的交互逻辑\\n /// </summary>\\n public partial class MainWindow : Window\\n {\\n public MainWindow()\\n {\\n InitializeComponent();\\n \\n var viewModel = new MainViewModel();\\n DataContext = viewModel;\\n \\n // 订阅ViewModel的事件\\n viewModel.PlayRequested += OnPlayRequested;\\n viewModel.PauseRequested += OnPauseRequested;\\n viewModel.PlaybackSpeedChanged += OnPlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n viewModel.StartRecording += OnStartRecording;\\n viewModel.StopRecording += OnStopRecording;\\n viewModel.ScrollToBottomRequested += OnScrollToBottomRequested;\\n \\n // 初始化MediaElement\\n AudioPlayer.MediaEnded += (s, e) => viewModel.IsPlaying = false;\\n AudioPlayer.MediaFailed += (s, e) => \\n {\\n viewModel.IsPlaying = false;\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"播放失败：{e.ErrorException?.Message}\\\", \\\"播放错误\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n };\\n \\n // 添加键盘事件监听\\n this.KeyDown += OnKeyDown;\\n this.PreviewKeyDown += OnPreviewKeyDown;\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPlayRequested(object sender, string audioFile)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n if (AudioPlayer.Source == null || AudioPlayer.Source.ToString() != audioFile)\\n {\\n AudioPlayer.Source = new Uri(audioFile);\\n }\\n \\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n AudioPlayer.SpeedRatio = viewModel.PlaybackSpeed;\\n AudioPlayer.Play();\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"播放失败：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"播放错误\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n ((MainViewModel)DataContext).IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPauseRequested(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n if (AudioPlayer.Source != null && AudioPlayer.HasAudio)\\n {\\n AudioPlayer.Pause();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPlaybackSpeedChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n AudioPlayer.SpeedRatio = viewModel.PlaybackSpeed;\\n }\\n \\n private void OnStartRecording(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 开始录制时，确保窗口可以接收键盘事件\\n this.Focusable = true;\\n this.Focus();\\n }\\n \\n private void OnStopRecording(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 停止录制\\n }\\n \\n private void OnScrollToBottomRequested(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 延迟执行滚动操作，确保UI已经更新\\n Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new Action(() =>\\n {\\n if (BeatRecordsScrollViewer != null)\\n {\\n BeatRecordsScrollViewer.ScrollToEnd();\\n }\\n }), System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority.Background);\\n }\\n \\n private void OnKeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 处理空格键按下事件\\n if (e.Key == Key.Space)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n viewModel.HandleSpaceKeyPress();\\n e.Handled = true; // 阻止事件继续传播\\n }\\n }\\n \\n private void OnPreviewKeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 在PreviewKeyDown中处理，确保在控件获得焦点前捕获事件\\n if (e.Key == Key.Space)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n if (viewModel.IsPlaying)\\n {\\n viewModel.HandleSpaceKeyPress();\\n e.Handled = true; // 阻止事件继续传播\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"4.19 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 125}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46452e897dd088ef7ceec7c0d04c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_994597d2-89f2-4a8e-b316-faa1bf8046ce","document":{"content":"已成功修复节奏记录保存问题。修改了HandleSpaceKeyPress方法的逻辑，使得循环完成后需要再次监听到数据（按下空格键）才会创建新的节奏记录，避免了最后一条记录多余的问题。新的逻辑是：当达到循环次数时，将当前记录标记为完成并将_currentRecord设为null，下次按键时才会创建新记录，这样确保了每条记录都有实际的时间点数据。","task_status":""}},"timestamp":1770705528,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 监听循环完成之后需要再次监听到数据再创建对应的信息，目前保存的内容最后一条是多余的

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4662759a747cb14c4d1f7d917a29","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户提到当前循环次数设置完成后无法插入新节奏。我需要查看MainViewModel.cs文件中的相关代码，了解循环次数设置的逻辑以及节奏插入的实现。可能的问题包括：
1. 循环次数设置后没有正确重置状态
2. 节奏插入的逻辑有缺陷
3. 状态管理有问题

让我先读取MainViewModel.cs文件来了解当前的实现。
"},"timestamp":1770707388,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1770707390,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4662759a747cb14c4d1f7d917a29","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_967e3a6d-84ab-453b-8db4-71d2a78f755d","document":{"sub_content":"MainViewModel.cs","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"D:/WindowLearning/BeatCfgMaker/MainViewModel.cs","sub_content_tip":"D:/WindowLearning/BeatCfgMaker/MainViewModel.cs"}},"toolCallId":"call_967e3a6d-84ab-453b-8db4-71d2a78f755d","delta":"{\"path\": \"D:/WindowLearning/BeatCfgMaker/MainViewModel.cs\", \"explanation\": \"查看循环次数设置和节奏插入的相关逻辑，了解为什么设置完成后无法插入新节奏\"}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770707391,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4662759a747cb14c4d1f7d917a29","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_967e3a6d-84ab-453b-8db4-71d2a78f755d","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019c4662759a747cb14c4d1f7d917a29","toolCallId":"call_967e3a6d-84ab-453b-8db4-71d2a78f755d","content":"{\"content\": \"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 如果当前没有在配置，则设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n if (!_isRecording)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{timestamp.TotalMilliseconds}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n // 如果当前记录为空，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，标记当前记录完成，下次按键时创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加完成标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 将当前记录设为null，下次按键时创建新记录\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"12.71 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 368}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4662759a747cb14c4d1f7d917a29","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
从代码中可以看到问题：
1. 在`StartBeatConfig`方法中，`CanInsertNewBeat = false;` 禁用了插入新节奏的功能
2. 在`StopBeatRecording`方法中，`CanInsertNewBeat = true;` 重新启用了功能
3. 但是在循环完成时（`HandleSpaceKeyPress`方法中），当`_currentRecord = null;`时，没有重新启用插入新节奏的功能

用户的问题是：循环次数设置完成后无法插入新节奏。这是因为循环完成后，`CanInsertNewBeat`仍然是`false`，需要将其设置为`true`。
"},"timestamp":1770707394,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0" Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 当前循环次数设置完成之后没有办法插入新节奏

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4665a3a2773ba2b26201142c0d02","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户希望时间戳只记录到毫秒，不带小数部分。我需要查看当前的时间戳记录逻辑，看看是如何处理时间格式的。

从之前的对话中我知道在MainViewModel.cs文件中有一个HandleSpaceKeyPress方法，其中记录了时间戳。我需要查看这个方法的实现，特别是时间戳的格式化部分。

我需要使用read_file工具来查看MainViewModel.cs文件的内容。
"},"timestamp":1770707600,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770707602,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4665a3a2773ba2b26201142c0d02","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_64f612ab-d9a2-4aa9-88ea-25bd04e6519c","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019c4665a3a2773ba2b26201142c0d02","toolCallId":"call_64f612ab-d9a2-4aa9-88ea-25bd04e6519c","content":"{\"content\": \"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 如果当前没有在配置，则设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n if (!_isRecording)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{timestamp.TotalMilliseconds}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n // 如果当前记录为空，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，标记当前记录完成，下次按键时创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加完成标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 将当前记录设为null，下次按键时创建新记录\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n \\n // 循环完成后重新启用插入新节奏功能\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"12.85 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 371}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4665a3a2773ba2b26201142c0d02","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
我找到了问题所在。在`SaveBeatRecords`方法中，时间戳的保存格式是：

```csharp
writer.Write($"{{{timestamp.TotalMilliseconds}}}");
```

这里使用了`timestamp.TotalMilliseconds`，这个属性返回的是`double`类型，会包含小数部分。用户希望只记录到毫秒，不带小数。

我需要修改这个部分，将时间戳格式化为整数毫秒。可以使用`Math.Round`或者直接转换为整数来去掉小数部分。

我注意到在`HandleSpaceKeyPress`方法中，时间戳是通过`DateTime.Now - _startTime`计算的，然后存储在`TimeSpan`中。当保存时，`TotalMilliseconds`会返回包含小数的毫秒值。

我需要修改保存逻辑，将时间戳格式化为整数毫秒。
"},"timestamp":1770707606,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}
