entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0" Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 记录的时常只为nh，不需要带小数

用户反馈在插入新节奏时会多一条多余的空记录。我需要查看MainViewModel.cs文件中的插入逻辑，看看是什么原因导致的。

从环境信息中可以看到，MainViewModel.cs文件最近被修改过，我需要查看当前的代码来理解问题所在。

\"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 如果当前没有在配置，则设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n if (!_isRecording)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{Math.Round(timestamp.TotalMilliseconds)}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n // 如果当前记录为空，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... {"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46683ac7709bbe7a4ea9034e8e0c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
我发现了问题所在。在`InsertNewBeat`方法中，当插入新节奏时，会创建一个新的BeatRecord并添加到BeatRecords集合中。但是，如果当前正在录制（`_isRecording`为true），这个新插入的记录可能会与当前正在录制的记录产生冲突。

具体来说：
1. 当用户开始配置节奏时，`StartBeatConfig`方法会创建`_currentRecord`并添加到BeatRecords中
2. 如果此时用户点击"插入新节奏"按钮，`InsertNewBeat`方法会创建另一个记录并添加到BeatRecords中
3. 但是`_currentRecord`仍然指向原来的记录，这可能导致逻辑混乱

我需要修改`InsertNewBeat`方法，确保在插入新节奏时正确处理录制状态。
"},"timestamp":1770707775,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019c46683ac7709bbe7a4ea9034e8e0c","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46683ac7709bbe7a4ea9034e8e0c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"编译成功！虽然有警告说文件被锁定，但这只是因为我们之前运行的应用程序还在运行。现在让我总结一下完成的任务。\n\n"},"timestamp":1770707804,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1770707805,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46683ac7709bbe7a4ea9034e8e0c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_89b4804c-5412-4d70-ace4-15132ed61495","name":"attempt_completion","ch_name":"总结","display_name":"总结中","render_type":"MarkdownPreview","default_show":true,"need_result":false},"toolCallId":"call_89b4804c-5412-4d70-ace4-15132ed61495","toolCallName":"attempt_completion"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c46683ac7709bbe7a4ea9034e8e0c","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_89b4804c-5412-4d70-ace4-15132ed61495","document":{"content":"已修复插入新节奏时产生多余空记录的问题。修改了InsertNewBeat方法，在插入新节奏时如果当前正在录制，会先调用StopBeatRecording()停止录制，然后创建新的节奏记录并设置为当前记录。这样可以避免录制状态与新插入记录之间的逻辑冲突。","task_status":""}},"timestamp":1770707805,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0" Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 插入新节奏的时候会多一条多余的空记录

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770708007,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c466bdf8274478ed72d79e257323b","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_8a6fc569-e135-49e4-bafb-e5562230b092","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019c466bdf8274478ed72d79e257323b","toolCallId":"call_8a6fc569-e135-49e4-bafb-e5562230b092","content":"{\"content\": \"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 如果当前正在录制，先停止录制\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n StopBeatRecording();\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{Math.Round(timestamp.TotalMilliseconds)}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n // 如果当前记录为空，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，标记当前记录完成，下次按键时创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加完成标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 将当前记录设为null，下次按键时创建新记录\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n \\n // 循环完成后重新启用插入新节奏功能\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... \"using System;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Controls;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\nusing System.Windows.Media;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n /// <summary>\\n /// MainWindow.xaml 的交互逻辑\\n /// </summary>\\n public partial class MainWindow : Window\\n {\\n public MainWindow()\\n {\\n InitializeComponent();\\n \\n var viewModel = new MainViewModel();\\n DataContext = viewModel;\\n \\n // 订阅ViewModel的事件\\n viewModel.PlayRequested += OnPlayRequested;\\n viewModel.PauseRequested += OnPauseRequested;\\n viewModel.PlaybackSpeedChanged += OnPlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n viewModel.StartRecording += OnStartRecording;\\n viewModel.StopRecording += OnStopRecording;\\n viewModel.ScrollToBottomRequested += OnScrollToBottomRequested;\\n \\n // 初始化MediaElement\\n AudioPlayer.MediaEnded += (s, e) => viewModel.IsPlaying = false;\\n AudioPlayer.MediaFailed += (s, e) => \\n {\\n viewModel.IsPlaying = false;\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"播放失败：{e.ErrorException?.Message}\\\", \\\"播放错误\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n };\\n \\n // 添加键盘事件监听\\n this.KeyDown += OnKeyDown;\\n this.PreviewKeyDown += OnPreviewKeyDown;\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPlayRequested(object sender, string audioFile)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n if (AudioPlayer.Source == null || AudioPlayer.Source.ToString() != audioFile)\\n {\\n AudioPlayer.Source = new Uri(audioFile);\\n }\\n \\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n AudioPlayer.SpeedRatio = viewModel.PlaybackSpeed;\\n AudioPlayer.Play();\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"播放失败：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"播放错误\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n ((MainViewModel)DataContext).IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPauseRequested(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n if (AudioPlayer.Source != null && AudioPlayer.HasAudio)\\n {\\n AudioPlayer.Pause();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPlaybackSpeedChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n AudioPlayer.SpeedRatio = viewModel.PlaybackSpeed;\\n }\\n \\n private void OnStartRecording(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 开始录制时，确保窗口可以接收键盘事件\\n this.Focusable = true;\\n this.Focus();\\n }\\n \\n private void OnStopRecording(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 停止录制\\n }\\n \\n private void OnScrollToBottomRequested(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 延迟执行滚动操作，确保UI已经更新\\n Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new Action(() =>\\n {\\n if (BeatRecordsScrollViewer != null)\\n {\\n BeatRecordsScrollViewer.ScrollToEnd();\\n }\\n }), System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority.Background);\\n }\\n \\n private void OnKeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 处理空格键按下事件\\n if (e.Key == Key.Space)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n viewModel.HandleSpaceKeyPress();\\n e.Handled = true; // 阻止事件继续传播\\n }\\n }\\n \\n private void OnPreviewKeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 在PreviewKeyDown中处理，确保在控件获得焦点前捕获事件\\n if (e.Key == Key.Space)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n if (viewModel.IsPlaying)\\n {\\n viewModel.HandleSpaceKeyPress();\\n e.Handled = true; // 阻止事件继续传播\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"4.19 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 125}"}

我需要修改MainViewModel.cs文件中的`HandleSpaceKeyPress`方法，让它能够获取音频播放器的当前位置。这需要在MainWindow中提供一个方法来获取当前播放位置，并在ViewModel中调用它。

首先，我需要在MainWindow中添加一个方法来获取当前播放位置：




"},"timestamp":1770708016,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0" Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 记录的时间不对，当我配置新节奏的时候时间应该为当前音乐播放的时间

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1770708084,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"bb8ec544-bd2e-49d5-83f1-4a1564543f08","name":"task_planning","ch_name":"任务规划完成","display_name":"任务规划中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":false,"loading_display_type":"point"},"toolCallId":"bb8ec544-bd2e-49d5-83f1-4a1564543f08","toolCallName":"task_planning"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1770708104,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"bb8ec544-bd2e-49d5-83f1-4a1564543f08","display_name":"任务规划完成"},"messageId":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","toolCallId":"bb8ec544-bd2e-49d5-83f1-4a1564543f08","content":""}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户说时间应该是"当前音乐播放经过的时间，起点为音乐播放的起点"。这意味着时间应该从音乐开始播放时计算，而不是使用MediaElement的Position属性。

让我重新查看当前的代码实现，看看问题在哪里。根据之前的修改，我可能错误地将时间计算改为了使用音频播放器的当前位置，但用户想要的是从音乐开始播放时计算的时间差。

我需要：
1. 重新查看MainViewModel.cs中的时间计算逻辑
2. 确保时间是从音乐开始播放时计算的
3. 可能需要在PlayAudio方法中正确设置_startTime

让我先读取MainViewModel.cs文件来查看当前的时间计算逻辑。
"},"timestamp":1770708108,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

\"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 如果当前正在录制，先停止录制\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n StopBeatRecording();\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{Math.Round(timestamp.TotalMilliseconds)}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; {"messageId":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"现在我看到了问题！在`HandleSpaceKeyPress`方法中，时间计算使用的是`DateTime.Now - _startTime`，但是`_startTime`是在`PlayAudio`方法中设置的，这意味着时间是从音乐开始播放时计算的，这是正确的。

但是问题可能在于`_startTime`的设置时机。让我检查一下`PlayAudio`方法中的`_startTime`设置逻辑，确保它在音乐真正开始播放时被正确设置。

我看到在`PlayAudio`方法中，`_startTime = DateTime.Now;`是在播放请求发出后立即设置的，但音乐可能还没有真正开始播放。这可能导致了时间计算的偏差。

我需要修改逻辑，确保`_startTime`在音乐真正开始播放时设置。让我查看MainWindow.xaml.cs文件，看看是否有音乐开始播放的事件可以监听。

"},"timestamp":1770708115,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

\"using System;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Controls;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\nusing System.Windows.Media;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n /// <summary>\\n /// MainWindow.xaml 的交互逻辑\\n /// </summary>\\n public partial class MainWindow : Window\\n {\\n public MainWindow()\\n {\\n InitializeComponent();\\n \\n var viewModel = new MainViewModel();\\n DataContext = viewModel;\\n \\n // 订阅ViewModel的事件\\n viewModel.PlayRequested += OnPlayRequested;\\n viewModel.PauseRequested += OnPauseRequested;\\n viewModel.PlaybackSpeedChanged += OnPlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n viewModel.StartRecording += OnStartRecording;\\n viewModel.StopRecording += OnStopRecording;\\n viewModel.ScrollToBottomRequested += OnScrollToBottomRequested;\\n \\n // 初始化MediaElement\\n AudioPlayer.MediaEnded += (s, e) => viewModel.IsPlaying = false;\\n AudioPlayer.MediaFailed += (s, e) => \\n {\\n viewModel.IsPlaying = false;\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"播放失败：{e.ErrorException?.Message}\\\", \\\"播放错误\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n };\\n \\n // 添加键盘事件监听\\n this.KeyDown += OnKeyDown;\\n this.PreviewKeyDown += OnPreviewKeyDown;\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPlayRequested(object sender, string audioFile)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n if (AudioPlayer.Source == null || AudioPlayer.Source.ToString() != audioFile)\\n {\\n AudioPlayer.Source = new Uri(audioFile);\\n }\\n \\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n AudioPlayer.SpeedRatio = viewModel.PlaybackSpeed;\\n AudioPlayer.Play();\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"播放失败：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"播放错误\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n ((MainViewModel)DataContext).IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPauseRequested(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n if (AudioPlayer.Source != null && AudioPlayer.HasAudio)\\n {\\n AudioPlayer.Pause();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void OnPlaybackSpeedChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n AudioPlayer.SpeedRatio = viewModel.PlaybackSpeed;\\n }\\n \\n private void OnStartRecording(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 开始录制时，确保窗口可以接收键盘事件\\n this.Focusable = true;\\n this.Focus();\\n }\\n \\n private void OnStopRecording(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 停止录制\\n }\\n \\n private void OnScrollToBottomRequested(object sender, EventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 延迟执行滚动操作，确保UI已经更新\\n Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(new Action(() =>\\n {\\n if (BeatRecordsScrollViewer != null)\\n {\\n BeatRecordsScrollViewer.ScrollToEnd();\\n }\\n }), System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority.Background);\\n }\\n \\n private void OnKeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 处理空格键按下事件\\n if (e.Key == Key.Space)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n viewModel.HandleSpaceKeyPress();\\n e.Handled = true; // 阻止事件继续传播\\n }\\n }\\n \\n private void OnPreviewKeyDown(object sender, KeyEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 在PreviewKeyDown中处理，确保在控件获得焦点前捕获事件\\n if (e.Key == Key.Space)\\n {\\n var viewModel = (MainViewModel)DataContext;\\n if (viewModel.IsPlaying)\\n {\\n viewModel.HandleSpaceKeyPress();\\n e.Handled = true; // 阻止事件继续传播\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n}\\n... {"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c466d1ac67c359e0cc492b5859867","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","tool_call_id":"call_f5806cd8-e95c-4cfe-b192-16053b895fcf","document":{"content":"我成功修复了时间记录的问题。主要修改包括：1) 在MainWindow.xaml.cs中添加了MediaOpened事件监听器，在媒体真正开始播放时通知ViewModel；2) 在MainViewModel.cs中添加了OnMediaOpened方法，确保_startTime在音乐真正开始播放时设置；3) 修改了PlayAudio方法，移除了立即设置_startTime的逻辑，改为在MediaOpened事件中设置。这样时间记录将准确反映从音乐播放起点开始经过的时间。","task_status":""}},"timestamp":1770708244,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0" Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4670e2b7734aa0e176ad46eae29a","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户提到点击停止之后插入新节奏，计时没有清零。这意味着在停止录制时，计时器应该被重置，但当前实现可能没有这样做。

我需要：
1. 查看停止按钮的实现逻辑
2. 查看计时器清零的逻辑
3. 修改代码确保停止时计时器清零

让我先读取MainViewModel.cs文件来了解当前的实现。
"},"timestamp":1770708336,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 开始时间将在MediaOpened事件中设置，确保媒体真正开始播放\\n }\\n }\\n \\n // 媒体真正开始播放时调用\\n public void OnMediaOpened()\\n {\\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 如果当前正在录制，先停止录制\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n StopBeatRecording();\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{Math.Round(timestamp.TotalMilliseconds)}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n // 如果当前记录为空，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，标记当前记录完成，下次按键时创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加完成标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 将当前记录设为null，下次按键时创建新记录\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n \\n // 循环完成后重新启用插入新节奏功能\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... entry.value:
<Window x:Class="BeatCfgMaker.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BeatCfgMaker" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="BeatCfgMaker" Height="600" Width="800" MinHeight="600" MinWidth="800">
<Window.Resources> <local:BoolToPlayStatusConverter x:Key="PlayStatusConverter"/> <local:NewlineConverter x:Key="NewlineConverter"/> </Window.Resources>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30"></RowDefinition> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="80"></RowDefinition> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Left" Orientation="Horizontal"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="选择文件" Command="{Binding SelectFileCommand}"></Button> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Content="保存文件" Margin="10,0,0,0" Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"></Button> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Margin="10"> <TextBlock Text="已选择的文件：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SelectedFiles}" Height="30"/> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="10"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="节奏内容" FontWeight="Bold"/>
<!-- 新增的配置行 --> <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,10,0,10"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="10"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="0"> <TextBlock Text="循环监听次数：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding CycleCount, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入每次循环需要监听的次数"/> </StackPanel>
<StackPanel Grid.Column="2"> <TextBlock Text="记录信息：" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <TextBox Text="{Binding RecordInfo, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Height="25" VerticalAlignment="Center" ToolTip="输入本次节奏记录的相关信息"/> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center"> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="-150,10,0,0" Content="开始配置" Command="{Binding StartConfigCommand}"/> <Button Height="30" Width="100" Margin="150,10,0,0" Content="插入新节奏" Command="{Binding InsertNewBeatCommand}"/> </Grid>
<!-- 节奏记录显示区域 --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,20,0,0"> <TextBlock Text="节奏记录：" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,5"/> <ScrollViewer x:Name="BeatRecordsScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Height="200" Margin="0,10,0,0"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding BeatRecords}"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border BorderBrush="LightGray" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,5,0,5" Padding="10"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="{Binding RecordInfo, Converter={StaticResource NewlineConverter}}" FontWeight="SemiBold" TextWrapping="Wrap"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleCount, StringFormat='循环次数: {0}'}" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Timestamps}" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <TextBlock Text="{Binding StringFormat='时间点: {0:hh\\:mm\\:ss\\.fff}'}" Margin="0,2,0,2"/> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </StackPanel> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<Border Grid.Row="3" Background="LightGray" BorderBrush="DarkGray" BorderThickness="1"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,0">
<Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="播放" Command="{Binding PlayCommand}" Margin="0,0,10,0" Background="LightGreen"/> <Button Width="60" Height="40" Content="停止" Command="{Binding PauseCommand}" Margin="0,0,20,0" Background="LightCoral"/>
<TextBlock Text="倍速：" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <ComboBox Width="80" Height="30" SelectedValue="{Binding PlaybackSpeed}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,20,0"> <ComboBoxItem Content="0.5x" Tag="0.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="正常" Tag="1.0" IsSelected="True"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="1.5x" Tag="1.5"/> <ComboBoxItem Content="2.0x" Tag="2.0"/> </ComboBox>
<TextBlock Text="{Binding IsPlaying, Converter={StaticResource PlayStatusConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="DarkBlue"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<MediaElement x:Name="AudioPlayer" Grid.RowSpan="3" Visibility="Hidden" LoadedBehavior="Manual" UnloadedBehavior="Manual"/> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: question
option.value: 点击停止之后插入新节奏，计时没有清零

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4673259f76d1b7fecb741f443446","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
用户提供了一个beat记录的示例，时间戳非常大（63906334030010），这明显有问题。从历史对话来看，之前我们修复过时间记录的问题，但看起来现在又出现了新的问题。

我需要查看当前的时间戳计算逻辑。从历史对话摘要中，我看到之前我们修改过时间记录逻辑，但可能还有问题。

让我先查看MainViewModel.cs文件中的时间戳计算逻辑，特别是HandleSpaceKeyPress方法中的时间计算部分。
"},"timestamp":1770708484,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

\"using Microsoft.Win32;\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Collections.ObjectModel;\\nusing System.ComponentModel;\\nusing System.IO;\\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\\nusing System.Windows;\\nusing System.Windows.Input;\\n\\nnamespace BeatCfgMaker\\n{\\n public class MainViewModel : INotifyPropertyChanged\\n {\\n private ObservableCollection<string> _selectedFiles;\\n private bool _isPlaying;\\n private double _playbackSpeed;\\n private string _currentAudioFile;\\n private int _cycleCount;\\n private string _recordInfo;\\n private ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> _beatRecords;\\n private BeatRecord _currentRecord;\\n private bool _isRecording;\\n private DateTime _startTime;\\n private bool _canInsertNewBeat;\\n\\n public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged;\\n public event EventHandler PlaybackSpeedChanged;\\n public event EventHandler<string> PlayRequested;\\n public event EventHandler PauseRequested;\\n public event EventHandler StartRecording;\\n public event EventHandler StopRecording;\\n public event EventHandler ScrollToBottomRequested;\\n\\n public RelayCommand SelectFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PlayCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand PauseCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand StartConfigCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand InsertNewBeatCommand { get; private set; }\\n public RelayCommand SaveFileCommand { get; private set; }\\n \\n public ObservableCollection<string> SelectedFiles\\n {\\n get => _selectedFiles;\\n set\\n {\\n _selectedFiles = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool IsPlaying\\n {\\n get => _isPlaying;\\n set\\n {\\n _isPlaying = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public double PlaybackSpeed\\n {\\n get => _playbackSpeed;\\n set\\n {\\n _playbackSpeed = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n PlaybackSpeedChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string CurrentAudioFile\\n {\\n get => _currentAudioFile;\\n set\\n {\\n _currentAudioFile = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public int CycleCount\\n {\\n get => _cycleCount;\\n set\\n {\\n _cycleCount = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public string RecordInfo\\n {\\n get => _recordInfo;\\n set\\n {\\n _recordInfo = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public ObservableCollection<BeatRecord> BeatRecords\\n {\\n get => _beatRecords;\\n set\\n {\\n _beatRecords = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public bool CanInsertNewBeat\\n {\\n get => _canInsertNewBeat;\\n set\\n {\\n _canInsertNewBeat = value;\\n OnPropertyChanged();\\n // 通过属性变更通知来更新命令状态\\n OnPropertyChanged(nameof(CanInsertNewBeat));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n public MainViewModel()\\n {\\n SelectedFiles = new ObservableCollection<string>();\\n BeatRecords = new ObservableCollection<BeatRecord>();\\n BeatRecords.CollectionChanged += BeatRecords_CollectionChanged;\\n SelectFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SelectFile);\\n PlayCommand = new RelayCommand(PlayAudio, CanPlayAudio);\\n PauseCommand = new RelayCommand(PauseAudio, CanPauseAudio);\\n StartConfigCommand = new RelayCommand(StartBeatConfig, CanStartBeatConfig);\\n InsertNewBeatCommand = new RelayCommand(InsertNewBeat, CanInsertNewBeatFunc);\\n SaveFileCommand = new RelayCommand(SaveBeatRecords, CanSaveBeatRecords);\\n PlaybackSpeed = 1.0; // 默认正常速度\\n CycleCount = 4; // 默认监听次数\\n RecordInfo = \\\"节奏记录\\\"; // 默认记录信息\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 默认可以插入新节奏\\n }\\n\\n private void BeatRecords_CollectionChanged(object sender, System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs e)\\n {\\n // 当BeatRecords集合发生变化时，请求滚动到底部\\n ScrollToBottomRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n private void SelectFile()\\n {\\n var openFileDialog = new OpenFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"音频文件 (*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg)|*.mp3;*.wav;*.flac;*.aac;*.ogg|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"选择音乐文件\\\",\\n Multiselect = false\\n };\\n\\n if (openFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n SelectedFiles.Clear();\\n SelectedFiles.Add(openFileDialog.FileName);\\n CurrentAudioFile = openFileDialog.FileName;\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已选择文件：\\\\\\\\n{openFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"文件选择成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private void PlayAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile))\\n {\\n PlayRequested?.Invoke(this, CurrentAudioFile);\\n IsPlaying = true;\\n \\n // 开始时间将在MediaOpened事件中设置，确保媒体真正开始播放\\n }\\n }\\n \\n // 媒体真正开始播放时调用\\n public void OnMediaOpened()\\n {\\n // 如果正在录制，设置开始时间\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n _startTime = DateTime.Now;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPlayAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void PauseAudio()\\n {\\n if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n PauseRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n IsPlaying = false;\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanPauseAudio()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && IsPlaying;\\n }\\n\\n private void StartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n // 如果没有当前记录，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n _isRecording = true;\\n CanInsertNewBeat = false; // 配置时无法插入新节奏\\n StartRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n \\n MessageBox.Show(\\\"开始节奏配置，播放音乐后按空格键记录时间点\\\", \\\"开始配置\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanStartBeatConfig()\\n {\\n return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentAudioFile) && !_isRecording;\\n }\\n\\n private void InsertNewBeat()\\n {\\n // 如果当前正在录制，先停止录制\\n if (_isRecording)\\n {\\n StopBeatRecording();\\n }\\n \\n // 创建新的节奏记录\\n var newRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n \\n BeatRecords.Add(newRecord);\\n \\n // 设置新插入的节奏为当前配置节奏\\n _currentRecord = newRecord;\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"已插入新节奏：{RecordInfo}，循环次数：{CycleCount}\\\", \\\"插入成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanInsertNewBeatFunc()\\n {\\n return CanInsertNewBeat && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RecordInfo) && CycleCount > 0;\\n }\\n\\n private void SaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n var saveFileDialog = new SaveFileDialog\\n {\\n Filter = \\\"节奏配置文件 (*.beatcfg)|*.beatcfg|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*\\\",\\n Title = \\\"保存节奏配置\\\",\\n DefaultExt = \\\".beatcfg\\\"\\n };\\n\\n if (saveFileDialog.ShowDialog() == true)\\n {\\n try\\n {\\n using (var writer = new StreamWriter(saveFileDialog.FileName))\\n {\\n // 开始大数组格式\\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"beatRecords = {\\\");\\n \\n foreach (var record in BeatRecords)\\n {\\n // 格式：beat{key = 循环次数,value = {时间点1}{时间点2}{...}}\\n writer.Write($\\\" beat{{key = {record.CycleCount}, value = {{\\\");\\n \\n if (record.Timestamps != null && record.Timestamps.Count > 0)\\n {\\n foreach (var timestamp in record.Timestamps)\\n {\\n writer.Write($\\\"{{{Math.Round(timestamp.TotalMilliseconds)}}}\\\");\\n }\\n }\\n \\n writer.Write(\\\"}}\\\");\\n \\n // 如果不是最后一个记录，添加逗号分隔\\n if (record != BeatRecords[BeatRecords.Count - 1])\\n {\\n writer.Write(\\\",\\\");\\n }\\n writer.WriteLine();\\n }\\n \\n writer.WriteLine(\\\"}\\\");\\n }\\n \\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"节奏配置已保存到：{saveFileDialog.FileName}\\\", \\\"保存成功\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Information);\\n }\\n catch (Exception ex)\\n {\\n MessageBox.Show($\\\"保存文件时出错：{ex.Message}\\\", \\\"保存失败\\\", MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private bool CanSaveBeatRecords()\\n {\\n return BeatRecords != null && BeatRecords.Count > 0;\\n }\\n\\n // 空格键按下事件处理\\n public void HandleSpaceKeyPress()\\n {\\n if (_isRecording && IsPlaying)\\n {\\n // 如果当前记录为空，创建新的节奏记录\\n if (_currentRecord == null)\\n {\\n _currentRecord = new BeatRecord\\n {\\n CycleCount = CycleCount,\\n RecordInfo = RecordInfo,\\n Timestamps = new ObservableCollection<TimeSpan>()\\n };\\n BeatRecords.Add(_currentRecord);\\n }\\n \\n var currentTime = DateTime.Now - _startTime;\\n _currentRecord.Timestamps.Add(currentTime);\\n \\n // 如果达到循环次数，标记当前记录完成，下次按键时创建新记录\\n if (_currentRecord.Timestamps.Count >= _currentRecord.CycleCount)\\n {\\n // 在当前记录信息中添加完成标记\\n if (!_currentRecord.RecordInfo.Contains(\\\"（循环完成）\\\"))\\n {\\n _currentRecord.RecordInfo += \\\"（循环完成）\\\\\\\\n\\\";\\n }\\n \\n // 将当前记录设为null，下次按键时创建新记录\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n \\n // 循环完成后重新启用插入新节奏功能\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true;\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 停止录制\\n public void StopBeatRecording()\\n {\\n _isRecording = false;\\n _currentRecord = null;\\n _startTime = DateTime.MinValue; // 重置开始时间\\n CanInsertNewBeat = true; // 停止录制后可以插入新节奏\\n StopRecording?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);\\n }\\n\\n protected virtual void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string propertyName = null)\\n {\\n PropertyChanged?.Invoke(this, new PropertyChangedEventArgs(propertyName));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 节奏记录类\\n public class BeatRecord\\n {\\n public int CycleCount { get; set; }\\n public string RecordInfo { get; set; }\\n public ObservableCollection<TimeSpan> Timestamps { get; set; }\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"13.17 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 381}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019c4673259f76d1b7fecb741f443446","conversation_id":"019c4634967b7167a11b35aa9edafb5d","content":"
从代码中可以看到：
1. `HandleSpaceKeyPress`方法中计算时间使用 `DateTime.Now - _startTime`
2. `_startTime`在`OnMediaOpened`方法中设置，但只有在`_isRecording`为true时才会设置
3. 当用户点击停止后等待15秒再开始点击空格时，可能`_startTime`没有被正确重置或重新设置

问题可能在于：当用户插入新节奏后，`_isRecording`可能没有被正确设置为true，或者`OnMediaOpened`没有被正确调用。

让我查看MainWindow.xaml.cs文件，看看`OnMediaOpened`是如何被调用的。
"},"timestamp":1770708491,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}
